title: Close a table order after payment
description: This verifies that a waiter can complete a table order through payment and close it successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with a valid waiter username
Fill in the PIN field with a valid 4-digit PIN
Add a menu item to the order
Close the order and complete payment
Verify the paid state is shown

title: Log in and reach the role-aware home view
description: This verifies that a staff member can sign in with a valid 4-digit PIN and land on the correct authenticated home screen.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with a valid staff username
Fill in the PIN field with a valid 4-digit PIN
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify role-relevant operations content is displayed

title: Add items to an open table order
description: This verifies that a waiter can add menu items to an open table order and see the order total update.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with a valid waiter username
Fill in the PIN field with a valid 4-digit PIN
Add a menu item to the order
Verify the added item appears in the order
Verify the order total is updated

title: Process a pending order in the cashier view
description: This verifies that a cashier can review a pending order, choose a payment method, add a tip or split the bill, and move it to paid.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with a valid cashier username
Fill in the PIN field with a valid 4-digit PIN
Set a tip or split the bill option
Verify the order appears in the paid list
Verify the payment is marked as completed

title: Open a table from the table grid
description: This verifies that a staff member can view the table grid and open an existing table order from it.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with a valid waiter username
Fill in the PIN field with a valid 4-digit PIN
Verify the table grid is displayed
Verify an occupied table order can be opened

title: Review and create the daily cash closing
description: A manager or cashier can preview today’s cash closing, enter counted amounts and notes, and create the closing record.

steps.description: Fill in the login PIN field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify a closing confirmation is visible
Verify the closing record is created for today

title: Process a pending order with a payment method and tip
description: A cashier can select a pending order, choose a payment method, add a tip, and close it as paid.

steps.description: Fill in the login PIN field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Open a pending order for payment
Verify the order appears in the paid list
Verify payment details are reflected for the completed order

title: Create a cash closing and review its history
description: This verifies that a manager or cashier can create a daily cash closing and then see it recorded in closing history.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with a valid manager username
Fill in the PIN field with a valid 4-digit PIN
Fill in the counted cash amounts and notes
Verify the new cash closing is displayed
Verify closing history content is visible

title: Mark a delivery order as delivered and closed
description: A delivery staff member can complete an order by marking it delivered and closing it.

steps.description: Fill in the login PIN field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify the order is shown as delivered
Verify the order is removed from active workflow columns

title: Remove an added item from a table order
description: This verifies that a waiter can remove an item from an in-progress table order and see the updated total.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with a valid waiter username
Fill in the PIN field with a valid 4-digit PIN
Add a menu item to the order
Remove the added item from the order
Verify the item is removed from the order
Verify the order total reflects the removal

title: Close a split bill payment
description: A cashier can split an order total into multiple parts and close the payment successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the login PIN field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Open a pending order for payment
Verify the order appears in the paid list
Verify the split payment is accepted

title: Advance a delivery order through status stages
description: A delivery staff member can move an order across the delivery workflow until it reaches the delivered state.

steps.description: Fill in the login PIN field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Change the order status to preparing
Change the order status to on the way
Verify the order appears in the updated status column
Verify the delivery workflow reflects the latest status

title: View dashboard metrics and operations shortcuts
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can open the home dashboard and see sales metrics, operational status, and navigation options.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with a valid staff username
Fill in the PIN field with a valid 4-digit PIN
Verify today's sales metrics are displayed
Verify operational status and top products content is displayed

title: Review operational dashboard KPIs
description: A logged-in user can view the dashboard and see the operational KPIs and top products relevant to their role.

steps.description: Fill in the login PIN field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify operational KPI metrics are displayed
Verify top products or assigned tables are displayed

title: Move a delivery order through the kanban workflow
description: This verifies that a delivery staff member can assign a driver, advance an order across statuses, and mark it delivered and closed.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with a valid delivery staff username
Fill in the PIN field with a valid 4-digit PIN
Assign a delivery person to an order
Move the order to the next status
Verify the order appears in the delivered or closed state
Verify the kanban board reflects the updated workflow

title: Assign a delivery person to an order
description: A delivery staff member can open an order and assign a delivery person to it.

steps.description: Fill in the login PIN field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Assign a delivery person to the order
Verify the order shows an assigned delivery person
Verify the order remains visible on the board

title: Update a product stock level
description: An administrator can change a product's stock level and see the updated value in the inventory list.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the PIN field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the PIN field
Verify the updated stock level is displayed in the inventory list

title: Show an error for an invalid PIN
description: This verifies that entering an invalid 4-digit PIN prevents access and shows an error message.
